user_query: Read the most recently modified OneDrive file and check if any company names in it are Salesforce accounts.

plan.query: Read the most recently modified OneDrive file and check if any company names in it are Salesforce accounts.
plan.reasoning: The plan involves first retrieving the most recently modified OneDrive file using the graph agent and then checking the company names against Salesforce accounts using the salesforce agent.

steps.task: Retrieve the most recently modified file from OneDrive.
Check if any company names mentioned in the OneDrive file retrieved in step 1 are present as Salesforce accounts.

plan.synthesis: Combine the results of the Salesforce account check with the contents of the OneDrive file to provide a summary of findings.
